div.h1: BINARY LINKER DIAGNOSTICS: SYMBOL ATTRIBUTION PIPELINE
div.h2: Technical Specification: Tracking Undefined Reference Sources (ELF-64)

ol.li: Primary Attribution: The linker saves the first file that references the undefined symbol to provide helpful diagnostic locations.

Metadata:
file_idx: Internal linker index of the origin .o
sym_idx: Original symbol index for tracebacks
reloc: Byte offset in section for exact line reporting

blockquote.p: referenced by main.o:5 (.text+0x5) referenced by utils.o:120 (.text+0x120) referenced by lib.o:40 (.data+0x40) total references: 3 hint: check if helper is defined in helper.c

div.p: st_name: "helper" (offset 0x12) st_info: STB_GLOBAL | STT_NOTYPE st_shndx: SHN_UNDEF (0x00) st_value: 0x00000000
